title: Volundr Skills/Packs Index
description: Versioned, machine-readable index of Volundr packs and skills with provenance. Validated in CI by scripts/validate-packs-index.mjs (invoked from scripts/garden-lint.mjs).

version.description: Schema version this index conforms to. Must equal the schema's top-level `version`.

generated.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the index was last regenerated.

id.description: Unique identifier — the pack name or skill slug.

kind.description: Whether this entry indexes a pack or an individual skill.

category.description: Functional grouping — e.g. domain pack name, 'core', 'quality', or a skill family.

risk.description: Operational blast radius if the entry misbehaves.

source.description: Provenance — framework: shipped in-repo; earned: extracted from persona history; community: contributed externally.

date_added.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the entry first entered the index.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the pack dir / skill dir on disk (framework/community entries).
